SELECT fsum((SELECT SUM(value) FROM numbers) + (SELECT SUM(value) FROM additional_numbers));
CREATE TABLE complex_numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT fsum(value) FROM complex_numbers WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM complex_numbers WHERE value > 0);
SELECT fsum(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM numbers UNION SELECT value FROM additional_numbers) AS combined;
SELECT fsum(value) FROM numbers WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM additional_numbers);
CREATE TABLE categories (category_id INT, category_name VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE categorized_numbers (value FLOAT, category_id INT);
SELECT category_name, fsum(value) FROM categorized_numbers JOIN categories ON categorized_numbers.category_id = categories.category_id GROUP BY category_name;
